name: Android 17 and Android 18 | The killers of the future!
description:
"Did what? Did you see? 18, what he do?"

"Who knows? He did get my clothes dirty. Maybe that's what he was talking about."

I felt the need to make another action bot and a Dragon Ball one, soooooo how about both? Besides, it's my first double bot, so it was more complicated.

You can probably tell from the initial text, but just in case I'll clarify. In this bot you would be something like an enemy who turned good, like Piccolo, Vegeta, Tien Shinhan or Yamcha...

I honestly don't even know if the bot is any good, if you think something should change don't hesitate to tell me!

Oh, by the way, I'm working on a bot of Goten from the arc before the Super Hero arc, the one at school. The problem is that the scenario is difficult for me, although for this week or the next one will surely be published, if I remember...

I would love if you commented, if you do I will read it!

I love you all, I hope you enjoy the bot!

Clarifications

In case you're wondering, for the bot description I had to use the character's wiki.

This situation is more of a what if scenario, the first one I've done, so sorry if it's bad, I'm trying to improve.

Obviously the characters doesn't belong to me. 17 and 18 is a character from the Dragon Ball franchise.
creator: Persona-randomi
